# browser_oxide — Rust headless browser engine (V8 + own CSS / DOM / TLS)

> A from-scratch browser engine in Rust. V8 JavaScript (via deno_core),
> own CSS engine (Syntax L3, Selectors L4, cascade), arena DOM, Canvas 2D
> via tiny-skia, own stealth HTTP/TLS stack (boring2/BoringSSL),
> CDP-compatible debugging surface. MIT / Apache-2.0. Not a Chromium
> fork, not a Firefox fork. Intended for archival, accessibility, AI
> agents, security research, and CTF — see SCOPE.md.

- Documentation: https://github.com/yfedoseev/browser_oxide
- License: MIT OR Apache-2.0 (no MPL / AGPL transitive deps)
- Language: Rust (workspace of 15 crates)
- Maturity: pre-1.0, API surfaces not yet stable

## Getting started

- [Quick start (README)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yfedoseev/browser_oxide/main/README.md): install, the `Page` API, profile loading
- [Architecture overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yfedoseev/browser_oxide/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): the 15 crates, dependency graph, external deps
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yfedoseev/browser_oxide/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): how to set up, the V8 single-thread constraint, the lint/test gates
- [SCOPE.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yfedoseev/browser_oxide/main/SCOPE.md): what the project is for and what it isn't for
- [SECURITY.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yfedoseev/browser_oxide/main/SECURITY.md): how to report a vulnerability

## Engine subsystems

- [CSS Parser](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yfedoseev/browser_oxide/main/docs/CSS_PARSER.md): Syntax Level 3 tokenizer + parser with nesting
- [CSS Selectors](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yfedoseev/browser_oxide/main/docs/CSS_SELECTORS.md): Selectors Level 4 parser + matcher
- [CSS Values](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yfedoseev/browser_oxide/main/docs/CSS_VALUES.md): property value parsing, computed values
- [CSS Cascade](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yfedoseev/browser_oxide/main/docs/CSS_CASCADE.md): cascade, `@layer`, `@media`, `@container`, inheritance
- [DOM](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yfedoseev/browser_oxide/main/docs/DOM.md): arena DOM with `NodeId` (Copy, u32) handles, Shadow DOM, iframe contexts
- [JS Runtime](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yfedoseev/browser_oxide/main/docs/JS_RUNTIME.md): V8 via deno_core, DOM bindings, WASM, Web API surface
- [Canvas](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yfedoseev/browser_oxide/main/docs/CANVAS.md): Canvas 2D (tiny-skia), WebGL stubs, AudioContext
- [Layout](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yfedoseev/browser_oxide/main/docs/LAYOUT.md): box model via taffy, `getBoundingClientRect` with font metrics
- [Networking](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yfedoseev/browser_oxide/main/docs/NETWORKING.md): HTTP/1+2+3 + stealth TLS (boring2/BoringSSL) + WebSocket + SSE
- [Event Loop](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yfedoseev/browser_oxide/main/docs/EVENT_LOOP.md): timers, microtasks, Promises, requestAnimationFrame
- [Workers](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yfedoseev/browser_oxide/main/docs/WORKERS.md): dedicated / shared / service workers (separate V8 isolates)
- [CDP Protocol](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yfedoseev/browser_oxide/main/docs/PROTOCOL.md): Puppeteer / Playwright drop-in debugging surface

## Top-level API surface

- `browser::Page::navigate_stealth(url, profile)` — load a URL with a `StealthProfile`.
- `browser::Page::from_html(html, profile)` — load a literal HTML string.
- `browser::Page::evaluate(script)` — run a JavaScript snippet, return the result.
- `browser::Page::title()`, `body_text()`, `inner_html()` — extract rendered content.
- `browser::Page::human_click(selector)`, `human_type(selector, text)` — Bezier-curve mouse, variable-speed typing.

## Stealth / fingerprint profile

- `stealth::StealthProfile` — 40+ fields describing the browser identity (UA, screen, locale, GPU, TLS impersonation label, plugins, fingerprint seeds, WebAuthn shape, etc.).
- `stealth::StealthProfile::load_from_file(path)` — load a profile from YAML or JSON (auto-detected by extension); calls `validate()`.
- `stealth::StealthProfile::from_yaml_str(s)` / `from_json_str(s)` — parse from an in-memory string.
- `stealth::StealthProfile::to_yaml_string()` — serialise for round-trip / dump.
- Built-in presets: `chrome_148_macos`, `chrome_148_windows`, `chrome_148_linux`, `chrome_148_ru`, `chrome_148_cn`, `chrome_148_de`, `chrome_148_jp`, `firefox_135_macos`, `firefox_135_windows`, `firefox_135_linux`, `pixel_9_pro_chrome_148`, `iphone_15_pro_safari_18`.
- Back-compat aliases: `chrome_130_*` names delegate to `chrome_148_*` (the data was bumped to Chrome 148 in 2026-04-29; the old names stay so existing call sites keep compiling).
- Example YAML: `crates/stealth/profiles/chrome_148_macos.yaml`.

## Build and test

```bash
cargo build --workspace
cargo test --workspace -- --test-threads=1    # V8 isolates are per-thread
cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings
cargo fmt --all -- --check
```

## Crate inventory

- `css_parser`, `css_selectors`, `css_values`, `css_cascade` — the CSS engine (our own, not Servo's MPL crates).
- `dom`, `html_parser` — arena DOM + html5ever integration.
- `js_runtime` — V8 (via deno_core 0.311), DOM bindings, WASM, Web APIs.
- `canvas`, `layout` — Canvas 2D rendering and box-model layout.
- `net` — HTTP/1+2+3 + stealth TLS (boring2/BoringSSL) + WebSocket + SSE.
- `event_loop`, `workers` — timers, microtasks, dedicated/shared/service workers.
- `stealth` — fingerprint profiles + navigator spoofing.
- `protocol` — CDP server (Puppeteer/Playwright drop-in).
- `browser` — top-level `Browser` / `Page` API.
- `akamai` — Akamai BMP sensor payload encoder.
